# PuAccordion

## Intent

- disclosure group
- accordion panels
- show more content

## Prefer When

- Use for expandable content sections where users reveal or hide details.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for navigation tabs or mutually exclusive view switching.

## Import

```ts
import { PuAccordion } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

- `modelValue`
- `type`
- `accordion`
- `viewmore`
- `useMoreSlot`
- `lineNum`
- `customClass`
- `customStyle`
- `customMoreSlotClass`

## Slots

- `default`
- `more`

## Events

- `change`
- `detail`
- `value`

- PuCard
